item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Italian spiced low and slow roasted pork shoulder with red wine sauce androasted potatoes, topped with herb roasted root vegetables. Pickle on the side(6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Hainanese Chicken Rice – south Chinese aromatic poached chicken with galangalrice and topped with blanched bok choy. Ginger-spring onion sauce, sweet darksoy sauce and chili sauce on the side (1+13+15) GREEN DISH: Hainanese Porcini – south Chinese aromatic poached porcini with galangal riceand topped with blanched bok choy. Ginger-spring onion sauce, sweet dark soysauce and chili sauce on the side (1+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Fried fish cake with remoulade and sweet potatoes as fries (1) (2) (3)(6) (11) (15) GREEN DISH: dish Tofu coated in curry and chickpea flour, then fried, served with sweetpotato fries and remoulade (7)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Choripán with ensalada criolla. Argentine-style hot dog with chimichurri andsalsa made with tomato, cucumber, bell pepper, and onion. GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: choripán with ensalada criolla. Argentine-style hot dog withchimichurri and salsa made with tomato, cucumber, bell pepper, and onion.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Breaded white fish with homemade fried potatoes mixedwith garlic-vinegar-salt powder and lemon. Hereto tartar coleslaw,agave-mustard dip and old bay dip on the side (1+2+3+11+15) GREEN DISH: Ret Breaded chickpea “steak” with homemade fried potatoesmixed with garlic-vinegar-salt powder and lemon. Hereto tartar coleslaw,agave-mustard dip and old bay dip on the side (1+2+11+15)
